project.title: Agentic BT Generation
project.subtitle: Inspect PyRoboSim evaluation results and run selected behavior trees live.

paper_tables.title: Main PyRoboSim Comparison
paper_tables.caption: Main PyRoboSim comparison. Core60 rows are evaluated over 60 tasks and Lang50 rows over 50 tasks.
paper_tables.label: tab:main_comparison

paper_tables.title: PyRoboSim Success Rates by Archetype
paper_tables.caption: PyRoboSim success rates by archetype. Each row is evaluated over 12 tasks.
paper_tables.label: tab:pyrobosim_archetypes
rows: "Go to pantry, detect bread, and pick it up."
"Search pantry, then fridge for bread. If found, pick it up."
"Search pantry, then fridge for bread. If found, place it on table_tabletop."
"Search pantry, then fridge for bread. If found, pick it up and return to dining."
"Pick bread from pantry and place it on table_tabletop."

paper_tables.title: Language Robustness Breakdown
paper_tables.caption: Language-robustness breakdown by variation category. Each row is evaluated over 10 tasks.
paper_tables.label: tab:language_breakdown
rows: "Head to pantry, detect bread, and pick it up."
"Pick bread from pantry and set it on table_tabletop."
"Return to dining while holding bread, but only after you have found and picked it up."
"Search pantry, and only if needed then fridge for bread. If found, place it on table_tabletop."

paper_tables.title: Failure-Cause Breakdown
paper_tables.caption: Failure-cause breakdown on the PyRoboSim benchmark.
paper_tables.label: tab:failure_breakdown

paper_tables.title: Experimental Matrix
paper_tables.caption: Experimental Matrix
paper_tables.label: tab:run_matrix
rows: Main evidence for grounding and rootstocks

rootstocks.name: detect_pick
rootstocks.description: Canonical detect-gated manipulation pattern for direct pick tasks.
rootstocks.when_to_use: Use when the task is to go to one location, verify the target object, and pick it.
rootstocks.anti_pattern: Do not pick before detect succeeds.

slots.name: object_query
slots.description: Object name or category to detect and pick.

slots.name: source_location
slots.description: Location or object spawn to navigate to before detect and pick.

slots.name: open_before_detect
slots.description: Set true when the source location can be closed, such as pantry or fridge.

rootstocks.name: search_pick_selector
rootstocks.description: Two-branch selector search pattern with a guarded detect-and-pick branch at each location.
rootstocks.when_to_use: Use when the task says to search one location, then fall back to a second location, and pick the object if found.
rootstocks.anti_pattern: Do not make the fallback branch a blind navigate-and-pick sequence.

slots.name: object_query
slots.description: Object name or category to detect and pick.

slots.name: primary_open_before_detect
slots.description: Set true when the primary location can be closed.

slots.name: fallback_open_before_detect
slots.description: Set true when the fallback location can be closed.

rootstocks.name: search_pick_deliver
rootstocks.description: Search with selector fallback, then continue to a delivery step such as place or return.
rootstocks.when_to_use: Use when the task says to search across candidate locations and then either place the object somewhere or return to a destination while holding it.
rootstocks.anti_pattern: Do not put delivery actions inside only one selector branch.

slots.name: object_query
slots.description: Object name or category to detect and pick.

slots.name: primary_open_before_detect
slots.description: Set true when the primary location can be closed.

slots.name: fallback_open_before_detect
slots.description: Set true when the fallback location can be closed.
